rag_rules: AGREE assumptions must be placed in component type scopes when referring to component ports
AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees should align with AADL component structure and scope
Use valid AGREE syntax for declarations and expressions
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly as AGREE variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and use proper variable declarations
Boolean expressions in AGREE should match the actual data type of the port
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
